title: the central dogma
wikitext:
[]: the central dogma             Quote Post by ayanami_the_fifth » Sat Feb 11, 2006 9:56 am the central dogma wasnt dug up by humans, it was there, it was a 'natural cave', an angel was supposed to be at the bottom......what caused the formation of the central dogma and stuff?

[]: Re: the central dogma             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Feb 11, 2006 10:43 am ayanami_the_fifth wrote: the central dogma wasnt dug up by humans, it was there, it was a 'natural cave', an angel was supposed to be at the bottom......what caused the formation of the central dogma and stuff?

[]: Re: the central dogma             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Feb 11, 2006 11:02 am Shin-seiki wrote: Lilith arrived on earth with a bang (a.k.a. First Impact) 4+ billion years ago.

[]: Re: the central dogma             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Feb 11, 2006 11:38 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: Lilith arrived on earth with a bang (a.k.a. First Impact) 4+ billion years ago.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Feb 11, 2006 11:44 am When Ritsuko is taking Shinji and Misato to see the "secrets" below Nerv....we see some sort of rather organic looking honeycome structure...is that part of the black moon?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Feb 11, 2006 11:49 am SEELE 08 wrote: When Ritsuko is taking Shinji and Misato to see the "secrets" below Nerv....we see some sort of rather organic looking honeycome structure...is that part of the black moon?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Feb 11, 2006 12:01 pm Giant bees....run for your life! Maybe Lilith stored protohumans in there? Its to big to fit normal Lilim....creepy. That means....we may not be the last angel...aw crap.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Feb 12, 2006 10:31 am Thanks for posting those images, in this post I asked: Zugzwang wrote: This reminds me of something about the White/Black Moon. It went along the lines of: The surface of the White/Black Moon is clearly artifical. Anyone know where this came from?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Feb 12, 2006 10:38 am SEELE 08 wrote: Giant bees....run for your life! Maybe Lilith stored protohumans in there? Its to big to fit normal Lilim....creepy. That means....we may not be the last angel...aw crap.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sun Feb 12, 2006 10:41 am Creepy... reminds of the hives of the Aliens... yuck... Maybe this was the human-making factory... this'd explain our numbers... ehheheh... And what about that place where Ayanami made the dummy plug? You know, that place which looks like a brain or something like that... Once Gendo and Ritsuko were there also, with Ayanami, of course...
